Name: pyinstaller-onedir
Pitfall: --onefile is slow to start (unpacking); --onedir is faster for large apps; verify output size matches expectations
Keywords: pyinstaller build onedir onefile add-data hidden-import

Name: pyinstaller-add-data
Code:
# Windows uses ; as separator
pyinstaller --add-data "static;static" --add-data "templates;templates" server.py

# In code detect if running as bundle:
import sys
if getattr(sys, '_MEIPASS', None):
    base = sys._MEIPASS
else:
    base = os.path.dirname(__file__)
Pitfall: Use sys._MEIPASS to detect bundled mode; separator is ; on Windows (: on Linux)
Keywords: pyinstaller add-data static templates bundle meipass frozen

Name: electron-flask-fork
Pattern: Fork Flask process from Electron main
Pitfall: Must kill server process on quit; use resourcesPath for packaged app; check exe exists before spawn
Keywords: electron flask fork spawn server process python child

Name: ipc-contextbridge
Pitfall: Every exposed method must have matching ipcMain.handle; remove listeners to prevent memory leaks
Keywords: electron ipc contextbridge preload expose invoke handle

Name: ipc-main-handle
Pattern: Handle IPC calls in main process
Pitfall: Must match preload.js expose names exactly; always wrap in try/catch; return serializable objects only
Keywords: electron ipc main handle invoke channel

Name: electron-builder-config
Pitfall: Icon must be 256x256+; extraResources for bundled Python backend; NSIS allows custom install dir
Keywords: electron builder config nsis windows icon extra resources

Name: electron-updater
Pitfall: electron-builder creates DRAFT releases by default — must publish manually; release cache is 5 minutes
Keywords: electron updater auto update github releases draft

Name: single-instance-lock
Pitfall: requestSingleInstanceLock() MUST be called before app.whenReady(); quit immediately if no lock
Keywords: electron single instance lock prevent multiple window focus

Name: browser-window-setup
Pitfall: Always enable contextIsolation and disable nodeIntegration; icon must be 256x256+
Keywords: electron browserwindow setup preload context isolation

Name: vue-ipc-serialization
Pattern: Vue reactive proxy breaks IPC serialization
Pitfall: Vue reactive proxies can't be serialized through IPC — convert with spread or JSON parse/stringify
Keywords: electron vue reactive proxy ipc serialize convert

Name: license-system
Pitfall: Hardware ID changes if user upgrades RAM/NIC — consider grace period; never hardcode license keys
Keywords: electron license hardware id sha256 fingerprint verification

Name: dev-skip-license
Pitfall: Use app.isPackaged check; env var name should include project prefix; NEVER ship with skip enabled
Keywords: electron dev skip license development environment variable

Name: electron-vite-setup
Code:
# electron-vite for modern Electron dev
npm create electron-vite@latest

# Structure:
src/
├── main/       # Main process (electron)
├── preload/    # Preload scripts
└── renderer/   # Vue/React frontend
Pitfall: electron-vite handles HMR and build automatically; separate entry points per process
Keywords: electron vite build setup hot reload development

Name: tray-icon
Pitfall: Tray icon should be 16x16 or it looks blurry; keep tray variable to prevent GC
Keywords: electron tray icon system menu context

Name: window-state-persist
Pitfall: Save on close not resize (too frequent); validate bounds are on-screen before restoring
Keywords: electron window state persist remember size position bounds

Name: deep-link
Pitfall: Different registration for dev vs packaged; handle URL in second-instance event too
Keywords: electron deep link protocol handler custom url scheme

Name: browserview-embed
Pattern: Embed external web content via BrowserView
Pitfall: BrowserView replaces deprecated webview tag; set autoResize for responsive; dispose on window close
Keywords: electron browserview embed web content external
